<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Translation\Dumper; use Symfony\Component\Translation\MessageCatalogue; /** * DumperInterface is the interface implemented by all translation dumpers. * There is no common option. * * @author Michel Salib <michelsalib@hotmail.com> */ interface DumperInterface { /** * Dumps the message catalogue. * * @param array $options Options that are used by the dumper */ public function dump(MessageCatalogue $messages, array $options = []): void; }
